known_issues: Media assets not loading for authenticated admin users due to strict principal validation in getMediaAssets

existing_features.title: Test and verify that media list loads correctly on the admin media manager page after user authentication and login

new_feature_requests.summary: Modify getMediaAssets backend function to allow access for any authenticated user, removing strict principal validation that blocks media listing
Ensure deleteMediaAsset retains role-based authorization checking for 'admin' role only, keeping existing admin validation logic
Verify media upload logic remains unmodified and continues to function correctly

projectName: Fix media loading for authenticated admin users
